message:
Show windows from other spaces in separate section

- Add isOnCurrentSpace property to WindowInfo
- Query CGWindowList twice: once with .optionOnScreenOnly for current
  space detection and z-order, once without for all windows
- Use CG window list to add windows from other spaces that AX can't see
- Display "Other Spaces" section below current space windows with divider
- Slightly dim other-space windows for visual distinction
- Keyboard navigation works seamlessly across both sections
